ab: kasauny pitju milingan a ku sina gakuan.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: patagilj anga kitulu, ljetaladj anga sinsi sema kiusic, qivu a hanciw:“ gacalju! kicungalu !”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: a sini tulu na nia sinsi pakata pinaiwanan a semupu
ch: 上課老師教我們，關於數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Paiwan language of numbers.

ab: timitja kiciuli ta sinsi kisupu, na semenay a men ta semupu a senay.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: liaw anga u kinasaigu a pinaiwanan.
en: I have learned many Paiwan languages.

ab: ljemita ta qadaw ma gakku a ken, ljemita ta qadaw kitulutulu tua pinaiwanan, uli kiljavaljang sasi palanda tja kina.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Paiwan language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
